title: stevia neglecta
intro: Stevia neglecta is a plant species within the Stevia genus, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to South America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of the Stevia neglecta plant have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antimicrobial agent. Stevia neglecta can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for their health issues.
